ideation: This animation sequence portrays the act of sending an email.  The robot will mimic the action of typing on a keyboard and then sending the email with a gesture.  The left arm will remain mostly still, acting as a support, while the right arm will perform the more dynamic actions. Since our robot has no fingers, we will use a simplified representation of these actions.

frames.beat: right arm moves to simulate typing
right arm gestures sending the email outward
both arms return to a resting state
